page_metadata.biotools__summary:
An Interactive Web Server to Evaluate Prognostic Biomarkers for Lung Cancer.

Biomedical Informatics Institute.

OSluca ( Online consensus Survival for Lung Cancer) encompasses 35 expression datasets, provides 4 types of survival terms for 5741 patients of lung cancer.
